firestore_mql: db.sales.find({ "storeLocation": "Austin", "saleDate": { "$gte": ISODate("2017-08-01T00:00:00.000Z"), "$lt": ISODate("2017-09-01T00:00:00.000Z") } }, { "customer.satisfaction": 1, _id: 0 }).sort({ "customer.satisfaction": -1 }).limit(5)
